description: Heal for a share of damage dealt; any overheal is stored as a temporary shield that absorbs damage before HP.
tooltipTemplate: Heal for {lifestealPercent%} of damage dealt. Overhealing fills a temporary shield (max {maxShield} HP) that absorbs hits before your HP.

description: Every few seconds, attacks briefly become a whirlwind hitting all nearby enemies.
tooltipTemplate: Every {cooldownSeconds:1}s, attacks hit all enemies within {radius} units for {activeSeconds:1}s.

description: Below a low-HP threshold, gain a surge of damage and attack speed.
tooltipTemplate: Below {hpThresholdPercent%} HP: deal +{damageMultiplier%} damage and gain +{attackSpeedBonus%} attack speed.
